mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, BANK_CODE,BANK_ID, BANK_NAME, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, IS_DEFAULT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_BANK_AFFILIATED
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_BANK_AFFILIATED( ID, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, BANK_CODE, BANK_ID, BANK_NAME, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, IS_DEFAULT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_BANK_AFFILIATED SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE = #{paymentMethodCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = #{paymentMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{paymentTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{paymentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_CODE = #{bankCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DEFAULT = #{isDefault,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
